title: Rukmini Vasanth Files Cybercrime Complaint Over Shocking Viral AI Bikini Deepfake Scandal
description: Rukmini Vasanth has filed a cybercrime complaint after AI-generated explicit images of her went viral on social media. She condemned the misuse of deepfake technology and urged strict action as authorities begin tracing the source and removing the content. The post Rukmini Vasanth Files Cybercrime Complaint Over Shocking Viral AI Bikini Deepfake Scandal appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

title: Australia risks missing out on AI investment boom worth up to $US1 trillion - The Australian

title: Hotels Strive to Be Found as AI Models Conduct Travel Search
description: With people increasingly adopting AI to help plan their vacations, hotels are working to make sure that you check them out -- and check in. Whether using ChatGPT or AI-enabled travel sites like Layla.ai, it is already possible to pose search questions like: "Calm hotel with west-facing balcony" or "Charming hotel with spa that accepts dogs". This simple switch to plain speech searches belies major technical changes that mean hotels have to learn to become visible to AI models, AFP said.
